articles.author: Zahra Ullah
articles.title: Steven Seagal, Candace Owens and Trump’s ballroom commissioner appear at Russia’s top economic forum - CNN
articles.description: Once a gathering place for Western leaders and investors, Russia’s St. Petersburg International Economic Forum (SPIEF) features a guest list that includes an eclectic mix of American attendees ranging from conservative podcaster Candace Owens, US Commission o…
articles.content:
Summary
  • A Trump-appointed commissioner approving White House renovation projects attended Russia's economic forum in St. Petersburg.
